mapper.select: SELECT * FROM bid_ys WHERE po_form_num = #{poFormNum} AND is_valid = 1
SELECT * FROM bid_ys WHERE form_num = #{poFormNum} AND is_valid = 1
mapper.update:
UPDATE bid_ys SET is_valid = 0 WHERE form_num IN
#{item}
mapper.select:
SELECT ys.form_num ysFormNum, ys.our_subject ourSubject, ys.supplier_name supplierSubject, ys.total_amount acceptAmount, ys.creator_no creatorNo, ys.create_time createTime, ys.po_form_num orderFormNum, ys.accept_status acceptStatus, ys.submit_origin submitOrigin FROM bid_ys ys
ORDER BY ys.create_time DESC LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{start}
SELECT po_form_num FROM bid_ys ys WHERE ys.form_num = #{formNum}
